title: vas3k/TaxHacker
abstract: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories. Uses AI to automatically categorize expenses, detect anomalies, and generate tax reports.
abstract_zh: 这个自托管的AI记账小助手，就像你的私人会计，能自动帮你整理收据、发票和交易，还能用自定义提示和分类让你的财务一目了然。别再为报税头疼，它会自动给你分类开支，检测异常，生成税报告。财务管理从此轻松愉快！
